channel.title: AI Governance on Asymmetric Intelligence
channel.description: Recent content in AI Governance on Asymmetric Intelligence

item.title: AI Frontier Monitor — Week of 30 March 2026
item.description: China’s state formalisation of AI tokens as an economic settlement unit and OpenAI’s compute reallocation from video synthesis to robotics pre-training are this week’s two structural signals — geopolitical AI architecture is now being built in terminology committees as much as in data centers.
